name: Vehicle_Make
notes: 2024 RAV4 Prime

name: Vehicle_Model
notes: PHEV variant

name: OEM_Crossbar_Profile
notes: Must measure cross-section before clamp selection

name: OEM_Roof_Load_Rating_Dynamic
notes: User must check owner's manual; do not assume

name: OEM_Crossbar_Spread
notes: Distance between front and rear factory bar centerlines

name: OEM_Crossbar_Feet_Spacing
notes: Distance between attachment feet on each bar

name: Platform_Length
notes: Provisional; verify fits within OEM-allowed overhang

name: Platform_Width
notes: Fits 48 in plasma bed and 48 in brake

name: Side_Rail_Return_Flange
notes: Adds stiffness without big windage

name: Deck_Material
notes: Corrosion resistant and formable; alternative is 1/8 in mild steel

name: Deck_Thickness
notes: 10 ga; verify brake capacity for full 48 in width

name: Material_Thickness
notes: Same as Deck_Thickness; named for SolidWorks variable

name: Inside_Bend_Radius
notes: R approximately T+ for 5052; verify with test coupon

name: K_Factor
notes: 5052 aluminum planning range 0.42 to 0.48

name: Clearance_Gap
notes: For deck slat / extrusion fit

name: Kerf
notes: Plasma planning range 0.06 to 0.08 in

name: Hardware_Pitch
notes: Tie-down slot pitch around perimeter

name: Relief_Size
notes: Approx 2x thickness for corner reliefs

name: Crossbar_Mount_Count
notes: 2 clamps per OEM bar x 2 bars

name: Crossbar_Clamp_Make
notes: Must be commercially rated; user picks Rhino-Rack/Yakima/Front Runner

name: Clamp_Bolt_Size
notes: Subject to actual clamp specification

name: Deck_Slot_Width
notes: For ratchet hook clearance

name: Deck_Slot_Length
notes: Allows soft shackle

name: Deck_Slot_Pitch
notes: Around the perimeter rail

name: ShiftPod_Weight_Estimate
notes: Bagged ShiftPod 2 nominal; user must weigh actual unit

name: Lumber_Max_Weight
notes: Per trip; example: 6 sheets 1/2 in plywood ~ 250 lb (over budget)

name: Static_Payload_Budget
notes: Below assumed OEM 150 lb dynamic minus tent and straps; CONFIRM OEM rating first

name: Dynamic_Factor
notes: Roof rack rule-of-thumb x2 to x4 for road impacts

name: Wind_Lift_Estimate
notes: Depends on frontal area and speed; user provides

name: Safety_Factor_Target
notes: Provisional only; final SF set by qualified review

name: Authority_Level
notes: Not fabrication-ready; not road-ready
